## Portfolio submission

- [ ] My folder is named `<github-username>-<short-slug>` and lives under `f1/`
- [ ] `portfolio.json` is filled in and `slug` matches the folder name exactly
- [ ] I've set `type` correctly (`static`, `prebuilt`, or `external`)
- [ ] I've included a `screenshot` image
- [ ] No `node_modules` or other generated/dependency folders are committed
- [ ] If `type` is `static`, there's no `package.json` in the embed root

**Anything reviewers should know?**
<!-- e.g. "this is my first PR" or "screenshot is slightly outdated" -->

---
*The `validate-portfolio` check will run automatically. If it fails, push a
fix to this same branch — no need to open a new PR.*
